final_answer: Partial order cancellation was not supported by the agent. As a result, the shipping address for the order was updated to Noah Patel's NYC address (zip code 10108) so he can receive all items there and handle returns of the home office items in person later. The hiking items will be kept, and no refund was processed at this time.

Ask whether partial order cancellation is supported (cancelling only some items from an order).
If partial cancellation is possible, ask the agent to look up the order and identify which items are home office items to cancel.
Confirm the list of home office items to cancel and ask for the total refund amount.
Request that the refund be returned to the original payment method.
Confirm the cancellation and refund details before finalizing.
If partial cancellation is not possible, instead ask to update the shipping address to the NYC address (zip 10108) and keep the full order.
Confirm the address change and note that returns will be handled later in person.
